misc_summary: This file contains legitimate miscellaneous content including: advertisements for Mitchell's Beauty Shoppe, The Deseret News Press printing services, L.D.S. garments from multiple vendors, Utah strawberries, Deseret Building Society investment services, laundry services, O.P.S. Flour, Bennett Glass & Paint Co., Relief Society clothing services, and Eureka Vacuum Cleaner. Also includes the magazine's table of contents, subscription information, publishing details, and masthead information for the June 1932 issue of The Relief Society Magazine.
